## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`, and `cargo test` pass (`src-tauri/`)
- [ ] If scheduling behavior changed, the interval math is described above
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated if relevant
